caption: The video displays gameplay from "MADDEN NFL 23," showing a wide view of a football field within a large stadium under a bright sky. A scoreboard at the top indicates the game is in the "2nd" quarter with "2:25" remaining and "35" seconds on the play clock. The score shows one team at "6" and another at "7," accompanied by team logos and "EXO" text. A small webcam overlay in the bottom left shows a man with blond hair wearing a dark t-shirt and headphones. Throughout the sequence, the camera pans slightly across the green turf. The man in the overlay is initially talking with an open mouth and then transitions into a wide smile and laugh, tilting his head slightly as he reacts to the game. The stadium background remains consistent with spectators and branding visible around the perimeter.
